message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ALLBUS 1990 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7759","justification":"Contains extensive measures on social behaviour and attitudes and political attitudes in Germany around 1990, matching the topics “Social behaviour and attitudes” and “Political behaviour and attitudes” for the 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1992 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7751","justification":"Includes German population data on social values, behaviour, and political orientations in 1992, directly relevant to social and political behaviour and attitudes in Germany in the 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1994 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7752","justification":"Provides 1994 data for Germany on social structure, social behaviour, and political attitudes, fitting the query topics for the 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1996 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7753","justification":"Covers social and political attitudes and behaviour of the German population in 1996, relevant to “Social behaviour and attitudes” and “Political behaviour and attitudes” in the 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1998 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7754","justification":"Contains wide-ranging information on social relations, values, and political behaviour in Germany in 1998, matching social and political attitudes topics."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 34.1 (1990): Health Care Issues and Cancer","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13440","justification":"Multi-country survey including Belgium, Denmark, Germany, Greece, Spain, France, Ireland, Italy, Luxembourg, Netherlands, Portugal, Great Britain, Northern Ireland; focuses on health care, medication, treatment, and specific diseases (notably cancer), fitting “Medication and treatment” and “Specific diseases, disorders and medical conditions” in the early 1990s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 41.0 (1994): Health Care Issues and AIDS Prevention","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13446","justification":"Covers several EU countries from the requested list and includes questions on health care systems, medication, treatment, and AIDS as a specific medical condition during the mid-1990s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 44.3 (1995): Health Care Issues and Public Health","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13452","justification":"Examines attitudes toward health care, medication, treatment, and public health risks across EU member states (including many of the requested countries) in 1995, directly matching health-related topics for the 1990s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 43.1 (1995): Political Attitudes and European Union","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Focuses on political behaviour and attitudes and views on European integration and international organisations (EU) across multiple Western European countries in the mid-1990s, matching “International politics and organisations” and “Political behaviour and attitudes.”"},{"title":"Eurobarometer 47.1 (1997): Trust in Institutions and Political Attitudes","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12346","justification":"Contains cross-national data for several of the specified European countries on political trust, behaviour, and attitudes toward European and international institutions in the late 1990s, aligning with “International politics and organisations” and “Political behaviour and attitudes.”"}]}
